subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Mahdí! Thou hast verily been mentioned in the presence of the Wronged One through successive years, and We had revealed unto thee aforetime [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل مهدی قد کنت مذکورا لدی المظلوم فی سنین متوالیات و انزلنا لک من قبل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
